name: Bruce Firmware (BETA)
author: pr3y-dev
description: Bruce is a custom firmware for the M5Stack Carduputer, designed to enhance its functionality and user experience. This beta version includes new features and improvements over the stock firmware.

name: GLIDE-Synth (Cardputer and ADV)
author: CHARL3X
description: GLIDE is a continuous-pitch polyphonic slide synth for the M5Stack Cardputer. Four key rows act like strings, every note glides between pitches, and the sounds are generative: you roll, evolve, and keep your own patches. Built by CHARL3X
